overall.description: A cinematic nighttime pan across an ancient Mediterranean city courtyard, showcasing classical stone architecture with columns and terracotta roofs. The scene reveals robed figures moving through a plaza below, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with atmospheric blue-hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient civic courtyard surrounded by classical temples

events.description: camera pan reveals the open courtyard plaza with figures moving below

agents.ego_description: stationary observation from an elevated rooftop vantage point, slowly panning right to survey the courtyard below

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures walking through the central courtyard plaza

entered.detail: large stone building with Corinthian columns and triangular pediment illuminated by torchlight
weathered clay tile roof in the immediate foreground
tall dark green cypress tree rising between the stone buildings
open paved plaza with geometric stone patterns visible between buildings
two-story stone building with shuttered windows and decorative cornice

segments.scene_description: From an elevated aerial position, the camera slowly pans right across a moonlit ancient cityscape. The view encompasses classical stone temples with towering columns, terracotta rooftops, and a central courtyard where robed figures move about. The cool blue night sky contrasts with warm torchlight illuminating the historic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial pan across a moonlit ancient cityscape that reveals the intricate layout of a classical Mediterranean center. It begins from an elevated position, gliding slowly to the right over a skyline of towering stone columns and terracotta rooftops. As the camera moves, the cool blue tones of the night sky shift to highlight the warm, flickering glow of torchlight illuminating the historic architecture. The perspective then expands to reveal a central courtyard below, where robed figures move through the plaza amidst the shadows of the temples.
